subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #066 The Subsistence of the Rational Soul after the Death of the Body
subcodes.first_line: Some hold that the body is the substance and that it subsists by itself, and that the spirit is an accident
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعضی را گمان چنین که جسد جوهر است و قائم بالذات است و روح عرض
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @relationship of the soul to the body, @the human soul
